sentence_reviews.text: External-data tools connect a model or agent to databases, APIs, files, search engines, sensors, and continuously changing operational state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA supports agents using percepts/actions and external information; the cited sources broadly support tool/data access concepts.
sentence_reviews.notes: The exact list of databases, APIs, files, search engines, sensors, and live state is broader than the citation.

sentence_reviews.text: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Caches, APIs & tool interfaces, Databases & information retrieval.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: External databases, APIs & live tools stores, selects, or obtains information through Sparse lexical retrieval.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The packet references support sparse_retrieval or the node mechanism broadly, but the dependency rationale is graph-derived.
sentence_reviews.notes: Relationship is plausible but should be verified with a dependency-specific source for exact wording.

sentence_reviews.text: External databases, APIs & live tools stores, selects, or obtains information through Dense vector retrieval.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The packet references support dense_retrieval or the node mechanism broadly, but the dependency rationale is graph-derived.
sentence_reviews.notes: Relationship is plausible but should be verified with a dependency-specific source for exact wording.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, External databases, APIs & live tools is modeled as depending on Caches, APIs & tool interfaces, Databases & information retrieval and feeding downstream nodes such as Tool use & function calling, ReAct-style reasoning and acting, API gateways, tool registries & secure connectors.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph positioning claim, not an external-world necessity claim.
